page: Microsoft Azure NV48s_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the NVSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor, paired with 448.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 9.33 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with four GPUs and includes 3019 GB of local storage. It is also designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk configurations. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this server type.

From a resource density perspective, the NV48s_v3 offers a high ratio of memory and dedicated compute cores alongside multi-GPU capabilities, positioning it in a premium hardware class. This configuration is designed for workloads requiring parallel GPU processing, substantial local storage, and large memory footprints, such as data science tasks, 3D visualization, and GPU-accelerated database operations.
description: Microsoft Azure NV48s_v3 is a dedicated x86_64 server instance in the NVSv3 family, managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 448.0 GB of system memory, yielding 9.33 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes four integrated GPUs and 3019 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are provided. This server type represents a high-density hardware class designed for resource-intensive operations. The combination of dedicated compute, large memory capacity, local storage, and multi-GPU acceleration makes this instance suitable for parallel GPU processing, data science workloads, and database operations requiring significant local disk space and memory.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV48s_v3 is an NVSv3 family server with 48 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 448.0 GB of RAM, four GPUs, and 3019 GB of local storage, designed for GPU-accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NV48s_v3 is a dedicated Intel-based server featuring 48 vCPUs, 448.0 GB of RAM, four GPUs, and 3019 GB of local storage.
tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU server featuring forty-eight Intel vCPUs, substantial system memory, and over three terabytes of local storage.
bullet_points: Forty-eight dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
Four integrated GPUs for parallel processing tasks
448.0 GB of system memory providing 9.33 GB per core
3019 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Suitable for GPU-accelerated databases and data science workloads
